title: InteractiveSettings
description: InteractiveSettings: Settings controling if Robot should be interactive and vissible during adapter actions.

IsInteractive.description: If set to false, Robot can not be modified through the UI during an adapter action such as Push and Pull.

IsVisible.description: If set to false, Changes in Robot can not be seen before an adapter action as Push or Pull has completed.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
